steps.action: Publishes transaction events in real time via API event stream with a unified transaction ID.
steps.improvement: Eliminates batch CSV exports and manual file transfers; enables same-day matching.

steps.action: Automatically ingests ledger events and payments gateway confirmations; runs matching algorithm using unified transaction ID.
steps.improvement: Replaces manual VLOOKUP; matching completes in seconds; full audit log generated automatically.

steps.action: Automatically routes unmatched transactions to the exception queue with enriched context.
steps.improvement: Eliminates manual email triage; exceptions are visible in real time with 4-hour SLA.

steps.action: Reviews exception queue in the reconciliation dashboard; resolves or escalates with one-click workflow.
steps.improvement: Context-rich exception cards replace email threads; all decisions are logged with timestamp and analyst ID.

steps.action: Automatically receives reconciled settlement data; populates regulatory and management reports.
steps.improvement: Eliminates manual data entry into the warehouse; reports reflect T+0 settlement status.
